title: Graph-Theoretic Node Ablation: FFL Motif Participation vs Structural Importance
summary: Demo notebook for graph-theoretic node ablation analysis on Neuronpedia attribution graphs. Loads 3 pruned DAGs from diverse domains (antonym, arithmetic, code_completion), enumerates Feed-Forward Loop (FFL) motifs, computes Motif Participation Index (MPI), selects degree/attribution/layer/random matched controls, performs node ablation measuring 4 impact metrics, and runs statistical analysis (Wilcoxon tests, bootstrap CIs, dose-response correlations). Uses full original parameters (2000 bootstrap iterations, 80 dose-response samples, 3 controls per hub). Total runtime ~2.1s on 3 graphs. Produces results tables and 2 matplotlib visualizations (bar chart of hub vs control impact, dose-response scatter).
